area_anchor: PLAT lp-do-ideas intake - operator idea structured pre-router
current_truth: lp-do-ideas operator intake currently depends on free-form follow-up inference for area, evidence, and next-step context, which costs tokens and makes evidence capture less reliable.
next_scope_now: Introduce a structured five-question pre-router intake for operator ideas, preserve Step 4 routing judgment, and make the required packet fields explicit in the skill contract.
adjacent_later: Shadow-test structured intake against archived operator ideas
Add explicit token and evidence-completeness measurement for future operator_idea runs
evidence_refs: operator-stated: replace free-form operator_idea intake with a structured five-question pre-router while keeping routing judgment intact
why: The intake path currently spends tokens inferring follow-up questions and evidence fields that can be collected more cheaply and more consistently through a short structured questionnaire.

intended_outcome.statement: lp-do-ideas uses a structured five-question pre-router intake for operator ideas, captures evidence through fixed prompts, and preserves the existing routing judgment path.
